patch.value: Improve update-command close and audit-owner failure guidance from telemetry

Persisted telemetry shows update is a high-usage, high-failure command path, with repeated close-through-update attempts and audit ownership restrictions. Improve remediation guidance and/or safe workflow affordances so users can recover faster.
Update-command failures for close-through-update and audit ownership restrictions produce clearer actionable remediation, with regression tests and updated help/docs where applicable.

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search update status closed close command telemetry failure audit ownership --limit 10 found only closed close-workflow implementation/history items and no active data-derived update UX remediation item. Telemetry evidence: update had 386 finishes, 105 failures, 27.2 percent failure rate; top patterns included invalid --status closed and audit ownership restriction errors.

author: cursor-agent
message: Starting update command error guidance improvements

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Implemented improved update-command error guidance. Changes: (1) Added structured PmCliErrorContext with code=close_through_update, why, examples, and nextSteps to the close-through-update error in update.ts so users get actionable pm close examples. (2) Enhanced ownership_conflict guidance in error-guidance.ts with audit flag recommendations (--allow-audit-update, --allow-audit-dep-update, --allow-audit-comment) as non-force alternatives. Updated tests: release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts (code assertion), help-runtime.spec.ts (unchanged assertions still pass). Evidence: all 1052 tests pass across 78 files.

value.note: enhanced ownership_conflict guidance with audit flag recommendations

author: cursor-agent

patch.value: Update-command close and ownership error paths now produce structured actionable guidance with audit flag recommendations

message: Close: improved error guidance for close-through-update and ownership conflict paths

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Enhanced update-command failure guidance for close-through-update and ownership conflicts with actionable next steps and audit-safe flag alternatives.
Users receive deterministic remediation instructions when update attempts invalid close transitions or ownership-restricted mutations.
Error guidance now includes structured close_through_update context and audit-flag recommendations, with integration tests remaining green.
